caption:
You already do the hard part. You show up, assess the job, and send a real number. Then most shops stop, and the quote just sits in an inbox competing with three other bids.

The fix isn't a better price. It's a follow-up cadence with a deadline built into it: confirm on day 1, get specific on day 3, add value on day 7, force the decision on day 14. Customers don't ghost because they found someone cheaper. They ghost because nobody gave them a reason to answer.

Want this built into your CRM so it fires without anyone remembering to send it? DM "QUOTE" and the Black Arrow team will show you how.

#ServiceBusiness #ContractorTips #HomeServices #SalesFollowUp #SmallBusinessGrowth
rationale: Carousels are currently outperforming every other format on saves, shares, and DM sends per the latest algorithm data, and this one hands over a complete, specific follow-up cadence (with timing and message logic) rather than a tease, which is exactly the save-and-share behavior the 2026 algorithm rewards.
